title: TechReborn MineLittlePony Armors
description: Running MineLittlePony with Tech Reborn? This simple resource pack will add pony model specific armors for Bronze, Peridot, Ruby, Sapphire, Sliver, and Steel.
body:
This mod uses the iron armor texture from the [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony) mod and recolors them to closely match the main [Tech Reborn](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn) Armors.

While Mine Little Pony does work with these armors by default, this adds some detail that the default kind of lacks on the more complex pony models.

Currently, the metal armors, Sliver, Bronze, and Iron, and the gem armors, Ruby, Peridot, and Sapphire are supported. I'll look into adding support for the battpack, better looking quantum armor and other details in the future.
